This biographical article relating to alpine skiing in Norway is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Jan_Thorstensen&action=edit).

(28 May 1933 – 20 August 2014) was a [Norwegian](/wiki/Norwegians "Norwegians") [alpine skier](/wiki/Alpine_skiing "Alpine skiing"), born in [Oslo](/wiki/Oslo "Oslo"). He competed in slalom and giant slalom at the [Winter Olympics](/wiki/Winter_Olympics "Winter Olympics") in [Cortina d'Ampezzo](/wiki/Cortina_d%27Ampezzo "Cortina d'Ampezzo") in 1956.[[1]](#cite_note-sref-1)

["Jan Thorstensen"](https://web.archive.org/web/20121105105507/http://www.sports-reference.com/olympics/athletes/th/jan-thorstensen-1.html). Sports-reference.com. Archived from [the original](https://www.sports-reference.com/olympics/athletes/th/jan-thorstensen-1.html) on 5 November 2012. Retrieved 7 April 2011.

Norwegian alpine skier (1933–2014)

**Jan Thorstensen** (28 May 1933 – 20 August 2014) was a [Norwegian](/wiki/Norwegians "Norwegians") [alpine skier](/wiki/Alpine_skiing "Alpine skiing"), born in [Oslo](/wiki/Oslo "Oslo"). He competed in slalom and giant slalom at the [Winter Olympics](/wiki/Winter_Olympics "Winter Olympics") in [Cortina d'Ampezzo](/wiki/Cortina_d%27Ampezzo "Cortina d'Ampezzo") in 1956.[[1]](#cite_note-sref-1)
